summary:
Smooth glossy margins result when there’s no damage or defect affecting the final polish; thus, “investment breakdown” doesn’t explain this outcome but other factors might indirectly impact shine by introducing imperfections. \boxed{B}

The answer focuses primarily on why an intact polishing process leads to shiny edges without mentioning specific technical steps beyond general principles related to removing materials correctly. It also clarifies that while investment issues can harm outcomes negatively, they don't create desirable qualities associated with proper finishing techniques used clinically. Thus, understanding these basic relationships helps pinpoint which scenario aligns best based solely upon provided information regarding desired versus undesired effects observed at different stages
